## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `npx create-liferay-react-cx ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Node version: [e.g. 18.19.0]
- npm version: [e.g. 9.5.0]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.2, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Liferay version: [e.g. 7.4 GA, DXP 2024.Q1]

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or error messages.
